## Summary

What does this PR do? Link to the issue it closes: `Closes #<number>`

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test / fuzz

## Checklist

- [ ] `go test -race ./...` passes locally
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes locally
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests
- [ ] Public API additions or removals are reflected in STABILITY.md
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No `any` types added, no `fmt.Println` in production paths

## Notes for reviewer

Anything that needs extra context: tradeoffs, alternative approaches considered, follow-up issues.
